data.formula: (Quantity * (Size$h + 0.35) * (Size$w + 0.35) * 1.1 / 144 * (Material + Lamination + Print_Color + Quantity$base) + Quantity * Shape + Shape$base + Material$base + Print_Color$base + Lamination$base + (Quantity$versionsCount - 1) * 10)  * Turnaround + Turnaround$base

data.helper_notes:
Notes Created: 06/14/2021


Production: DIGITAL Department or Outsource

Roll labels are printed on our Screen L350 UV Inkjet machine. It's a powerful machine and gives a great output.

It's a 5 Color machine. White + 4 Colors. Notes that White is the first pass, which gives us the option to print on clear and Silver metalic materials with White Support.

Custom Roll labels are a big part of our work, and those are projects we really work hard to get. The clients are usually very stable and we get repeat orders in periodic sequence.


For Project Managers




For Designers


Template: #335 (Template)

Resolution: 300 DPI for print files, 150 or 72 for proof files.

Bleed: Yes, 0.25", all around. So if the finished job is 4"x6", we need the artwork 4.25" x 6.25"

Files: 1 file for 1 sided projects. If you have a White Support make sure to make it spot "White" and Attributes "Overprint Fill" Must be checked.



For the roll Stickers the CUT FILE must be saved seperatly.

So you will have 2 files. Roll-Label-Name-E1036857-Print.pdf and Roll-Label-Name-E1036857-CUT.pdf


Naming Files: ProjectName-Front, ProjectName-E1036857-Front. Don't use and special characters like $, ", & and so on.

File Size: 50MB and up is too much. This will slow down our work. You may need to flatten it.


The Roll Direction Should be in the Proof soon. Working on the design.


For Submitters




For Production

productSchema.name: Roll Labels Printing
productSchema.description: Custom Roll Labels are an efficient, affordable, and faster way to utilize them for bulk orders. Call us today to get your roll sticker order with fast turnarounds.

data.question: What are roll labels?
data.answer: Roll labels are self-adhesive labels that are supplied on a roll. They are used for a variety of applications, including product labeling, packaging, shipping, and branding.

data.question: What are the benefits of using roll labels?
data.answer: Roll labels are easy to use and can be applied quickly and efficiently using a label dispenser. They are also cost-effective when compared to sheet labels, and they take up less space in storage.

data.question: What is the standard size for roll labels?
data.answer: There is no one standard size for roll labels, as they can be customized to fit the specific needs of each project. However, there are some common sizes that are often used, such as 2" x 1", 3" x 2", and 4" x 3".

data.question: Can roll labels be customized?
data.answer: Yes, roll labels can be customized with a variety of options, including the label size, shape, material, and design.

data.question: Can roll labels be applied by hand?
data.answer: Yes, roll labels can be applied by hand.

data.question: What if I don’t have design options, do you provide design services?
data.answer: We have a design service. Our team of creative designers have years of experience and are happy to help you perfect your preferred design. Before printing, we share with you the initial design of what it looks like and make changes if needed.

data.question: Is there a minimum order quantity?
data.answer: Yes. Minimum order quantity for roll labels is 250pcs..

data.question: What is the turnaround time?
data.answer: Our regular turnaround time is 5 business days for roll labels printing. But for last minute events we may be able to work with your tight deadline, next day or same day turnaround.

data.question: How much does delivery and shipping cost?
data.answer: Click on the “Shipping Estimate” button, which is right under the “Continue” button. Enter your zip code and it will automatically calculate the price.

metaData.title: Roll Labels
metaData.faq:
FAQ:


Q: What are roll labels?

A: Roll labels are self-adhesive labels that are supplied on a roll. They are used for a variety of applications, including product labeling, packaging, shipping, and branding.


Q: What are the benefits of using roll labels?

A: Roll labels are easy to use and can be applied quickly and efficiently using a label dispenser. They are also cost-effective when compared to sheet labels, and they take up less space in storage.


Q: What is the standard size for roll labels?

A: There is no one standard size for roll labels, as they can be customized to fit the specific needs of each project. However, there are some common sizes that are often used, such as 2" x 1", 3" x 2", and 4" x 3". 


Q: Can roll labels be customized?

A: Yes, roll labels can be customized with a variety of options, including the label size, shape, material, and design.


Q: Can roll labels be applied by hand?

A: Yes, roll labels can be applied by hand.


Q: What if I don’t have design options, do you provide design services?

A: We have a design service. Our team of creative designers have years of experience and are happy to help you perfect your preferred design. Before printing, we share with you the initial design of what it looks like and make changes if needed.


Q: Is there a minimum order quantity?

A: Yes. Minimum order quantity for roll labels is 250pcs..


Q: What is the turnaround time?

A: Our regular turnaround time is 5 business days for roll labels printing. But for last minute events we may be able to work with your tight deadline, next day or same day turnaround.


Q: How much does delivery and shipping cost?

A: Click on the “Shipping Estimate” button, which is right under the “Continue” button. Enter your zip code and it will automatically calculate the price.

metaData.information:
Get High-Quality Roll Label Printing With AxiomPrint


Roll labels are an efficient and convenient way to label and brand your products. Roll labels are self-adhesive labels that are supplied on a roll. They are used for a variety of applications, including product labeling, packaging, shipping, and branding. 


Our roll labels are available in a wide range of sizes, shapes, colors, and materials, making it easy to find the perfect match for your specific needs. Here, at AxiomPrint custom roll labels are printed on high-quality, durable material that is designed to withstand a variety of environments and conditions. Whether you need labels for your food products, cosmetics, or other retail items, our roll labels are up to the task.


Custom roll labels are easy to use and can be applied to various surfaces. They're also easy to remove and won't leave any residue behind. Whether you need a small run of custom labels or a large production, we can accommodate your needs and provide you with high-quality labels that are sure to impress. So why wait? Start creating your custom labels today and take your branding or personal style to the next level.


Characteristics of  Custom Roll Label Printing


Customization


AxiomPrint offers an array of customization options for roll labels printing. With our easy-to-choose options you can create personalized labels that reflect your brand essentials in the best way. In our customer-friendly online ordering system, you may choose the sizes, paper type, finishing and the quantity that meets your needs. Be assured that all of your special requirements are covered. We are very flexible and open to all special requests, notes and customization requirements.


Material


Based on your preferences we can offer seven types of paper materials:



has a non-glossy finish

is made of polypropylene

durable and resistant to water and oil

can be printed with high-quality images and text


has a shiny and metallic finish

is made of polypropylene

commonly used for high-end product labels, such as cosmetics and food packaging


transparent and has a glossy finish

has a see-through or "no label" look

made of polypropylene

is durable and resistant to water and oil


a non-glossy, white paper

commonly used for basic product labels and shipping labels

not as durable as the Bopp materials but is more cost-effective


has a shiny, metallic finish

often used for high-end labels, such as wine and spirits labels

durable and resistant


has a shiny, holographic finish

s made of polypropylene

eye-catching and can be used to add a unique look to product labels


a non-glossy, white paper

commonly used for basic product labels and shipping labels

not as durable as the Bopp materials but is more cost-effective

easy to write on with pens or markers


Lamination 


We offer two different finishing options for roll labels to add an extra layer of protection and enhance their appearance:

Matte Lamination: has a non-glossy finish that gives labels a softer, more muted look. It can help reduce glare and make text easier to read. It is also more resistant to fingerprints, smudging, and scratches than unlaminated labels.


Gloss Lamination: has a shiny, reflective finish that makes colors pop and gives labels a more polished look. It can also help protect labels from fading, moisture, and abrasions. This is a popular choice for labels that need to be eye-catching and stand out on store shelves.


Both laminations can be applied to label materials, including paper and Bopp. 


Shape and Rewind Direction


Here at AxiomPrint we offer Rectangular (Rounded Corners), Rectangular (Square Corners), Circle / Oval shapings and of course custom shaping of your labels. 


Rewind direction for roll labels refers to the orientation of the labels on the roll. And out of our options you can choose the one which is best convenient for your use.
